Caption: Proposed optimized recycling process. The process consists in 3 steps: first, an anodic treatment using a Na2SO4 electrolyte; second, a cathodic treatment in a mild acidic electrolyte; and finally, an electrochemical deposition. The process would allow to recover separately 4 fractions: the Al foil, Li, Mn and Ni-Co. The main advantage of this process is that it is entirely ran at room temperature.
